title: Notification No.121/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 121/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Director General (Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, New Delhi to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs (Import), ICD, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; (ii) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Faridabad, Haryana; (iii) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs (SeaPort-Import), Custom House, 60, Rajaji Salai, Chennai; (iv) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Mulund, Mumbai, Maharashtra; (v) the Commissioner of Customs,(Import), ICD, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; (vi) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Faridabad, Haryana; (vii) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Mulund, Mumbai, Maharashtra; (viii) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs, ICD, Patparganj, New Delhi; (ix) the Joint/Additional Commissioner of Customs (Seaport-Import), Custom House, 60, Rajaji Salai, Chennai; (x) the Assistant/Deputy Commissioner of Customs(Import), ICD, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; (xi) the Additional Commissioner of Customs(Import), ICD, Tughlakabad, New Delhi, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s. Om Enterprises, Shop No.108, C-Block, Central Market, Mamchand Plaza, Bhiwadi, Rajasthan and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number 23/93/2012-DZU(AJ)/3385-3424, dated the 4th July, 2015 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, Delhi. [F No.437/47/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
